title: Implement deterministic topological sort
description: graphkit.topo.toposort(graph) must return a dependency-respecting order for a graph mapping each node to the list of nodes it depends on (dependencies before dependents). Ties are broken in lexicographic order for determinism. Any cycle (including a self-loop) must raise graphkit.topo.CycleError. The function is currently a stub. Implement graphkit/topo.py. Do not modify any test files.
